displayTitle: Emissary of the Void (Parts IV V VI)
synopsis: An NJO-era tale during the Yuuzhan Vong War following rescue pilot Uldir Lochett and hunted Jedi Klin-Fa Gi; begins after Edge of Victory I: Conquest and weaves through Edge of Victory II: Rebirth.
title: Emissary of the Void (Parts IV V VI)
